aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite L3 HVAC due to limited conversational content and missing schema markup, but with improvements, they can become a strong contender.

action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content limits AI recognition.

agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 6 months.
